name: ascension
description: A merged AI development framework: god mode's 36-skill breadth (reference-first design, agent orchestration, UX/security/architecture) fused with Superpowers' battle-tested depth (subagent-driven execution with file handoffs and compaction-safe progress ledgers, plus a zero-dependency visual brainstorming companion).
credits: Base: god mode by David. Depth: Superpowers by Jesse Vincent / Prime Radiant (MIT). Merged and rebranded as ascension.
